wiki.summary: With countless references to style and fashion, this track illustrates that Rocky’s not only on top of the fashion game, but also paints a picture of how he wants his perfect girl to dress – and more importantly, in what brands. Throughout both verses in Fashion Killa, Rocky names twenty-seven high fashion brands. “Fashion Killa,” was certified gold by the RIAA on October 29th, 2018. Read more on Last.fm.
